channel.title: Notify users about new versions in CLI
channel.description:
**--- [Feature Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Notify-users-about-new-versions-1339b31675d149d09606d3efec505460)**
## Description It would be nice to notify the users of the framework about new versions of the different Frontity packages.
## User Stories
> As a **Frontity developer** > I want to **see if there is a new version of a package while developing** > so that **I can update my packages often**
## Possible solution **[jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007)** suggested to use something like the [update-notifier](https://www.npmjs.com/package/update-notifier) package in [this issue](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/263).

item.title: Notify users about new versions in CLI
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
— Feature Card

Description

It would be nice to notify the users of the framework about new versions of the different Frontity packages.

User Stories

As a Frontity developer
I want to see if there is a new version of a package while developing
so that I can update my packages often

Possible solution

jamesgeorge007 suggested to use something like the update-notifier package in this issue.

Read full topic
item.source: Notify users about new versions in CLI
